textByHash.494f0fe226aa9da9cf292d6a9703bdf27af56ce0: We're extending the cave so more people can live in it.
textByHash.51de32fdd68be0df577905c3e22a3d05343573dd: These Miscellanians aren't so bad. They appreciate the benefits of living underground.
textByHash.b4d615f3d0b37797bff90acaa469437b11dadc92: You don't get rained on, for example.
textByHash.47ea04f8707b8ed45325bb4c4d07cb13b7989a4f: Of course, there are some problems, like the monsters Donal saw...
textByHash.eb35e0ded2603f2635eef109ccc9c428f6926c22: One of the other dwarves who was working with us saw it. His name's Donal.
textByHash.b51bd930b09cad571f330e908e26cbad6f77544d: He went further into the caves to plan our excavations, and a while later he came out shaking.
textByHash.07dfc17cc410eea8a0d7c27fa33c991a5ab33291: He's been in the inn ever since.
textByHash.934216c223cac279b096e474a48418c37ff98e85: Well, if you want to hear stories about monsters, he's the best one to ask.
textByHash.8c76389edb159de7fc162242fcf2f84d88851800: Not getting rained on, for example.
textByHash.5ffe8cd0a39b56204bcd1e39ce03cb82bcdb2d31: You'd better get in there and do something about it, then.
textByHash.98bf43b5e96d6a05bd2a7c401249e9436abc4c98: Exile. You don't have many friends around here at the moment.
textByHash.bd7eebde1ab08007cefc8a153d38ed71bccfa499: Doesn't bother me. Some people take these things more seriously than others. On that note, do you need something?
textByHash.98c6dc313a9ca63c3770c9e3da06a5781f0bfd9d: Did you do anything about that monster Donal was talking about?
textByHash.c04c85494d7e2443f3df450e930393d0efca302e: Glad to hear it. Now we can get on with excavating.
textByHash.ca24aa749e695f5143aecc4482f319f34840476c: Thorodin, taskmaster for the Fremennik Achievement Diary.
textByHash.18fdd6f5a1c6eb81864c278a1573a999013a2b6d: It's a diary that helps you keep track of particular achievements. In the Fremennik lands it can help you discover some quite useful things. Eventually, with enough exploration, the inhabitants will reward you.
textByHash.ca64dc2762531723f270ebfeb7a0717ec1d4c1e6: You can see the list of tasks on the side-panel.
textByHash.4b83c2ca2d93b880000cc5ef1c45fd0957de26da: Well, there are four different pairs of Fremennik sea boots, which match up with the four levels of difficulty. Each has the same rewards as the previous level and some additional benefits too... which tier of rewards
textByHash.33774fc062adc196400baa566b9c7040e85b58a4: would you like to know more about?
textByHash.ea9e7ff1113223f2ab7a51ef266429ccb7b46814: If you complete all of the easy tasks in the Fremennik Province, Peer the Seer can bank items for you at all times and your enchanted lyre can hold an extra charge.
textByHash.445f5a98496ddcd9c8a224bff7c96ecad1c4935b: In addition to the easy rewards, your boots can teleport you to Rellekka once per day as well as an increased rate of gaining approval with your subjects.
textByHash.7eeafd6245d137874058378b56b6be717029950a: In addition to the easy and medium benefits, you'll be able to change your lyre teleport location to Waterbirth Island, access two new Lunar spells and you'll receive extra Agility experience from the Rellekka rooftop
textByHash.d77b00c452c3e1c17ae03c96c0879a90b2676c07: In addition to the previous tiers of rewards, your boots now have unlimited teleports to Rellekka, your lyre can be attuned to teleport you to Jatiszo or Neitiznot, you'll no longer need a seal of passage on Lunar Isle,
textByHash.e791772dd988917baf4e65c8f262700c5f5183e6: Dagannoth bones will be dropped as notes and your subjects will approve of your kingdom management even faster than before.
textByHash.082f647fff2a53fe59743ea7421476119b51abab: Just complete the tasks in the Fremennik Province so they're ticked off, then come and speak to me for your rewards.
textByHash.dcde908f634f6b62c7a270965bcb025d1ffb44b8: Ah, yes. Because you've completed the elite tasks for the Fremennik Province, their bones will be noted for you.
textByHash.c75d3972abe5f998631975859d9f85aae758eec0: If you'd prefer, I can change it so they will drop their bones as they normally would?
textByHash.0bf4554087380f16ae1858c50185a1ef5cbed07d: Very well. In future, when you kill a Dagannoth King, they will drop their bones normally.
textByHash.dc40fcebf514fad81dbde91dfdd0ac252aecd05b: Very well. If you change your mind, come talk to me again.
textByHash.d0a8d7dd1b2c4c14765afe050f0828fafe68901e: Ah, yes. You wanted the bones from the Dagannoth Kings to remain unnoted when you killed them.
textByHash.cbe4622639ebce1413412180ce4310e909b62d18: If you'd prefer, I can change them back to being noted instead?
textByHash.c3b6796af17a126656f6da2e9ff9a771c5614995: Very well. In future, when you kill a Dagannoth King, their bones will be noted.
textByHash.8e099187a868e3b6eca57bf212d856fe987d09a6: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!
textByHash.804b1046a939cb6a6934729590eed238229075b2: These boots are a symbol of your exploration of the Fremennik lands. They can teleport you here once per day, Peer the Seer can now bank items for you at all times and your enchanted lyre can hold an extra
textByHash.78ff84f645bff01a6958b7c9067728f257779ec3: If you ever lose your boots, come back to me to reclaim them.
textByHash.d7aa3e3eaf44fd40fd7abf04d2c0a854b488dbfe: I've upgraded your Fremennik sea boots for you. They can now teleport you here three times per day and have an increased rate of gaining approval with your subjects.
textByHash.d42a4e2fb8839c4c257d55417d1be07ef65a934b: You need to complete all of the easy and medium tasks too before I can reward you for the more difficult sets.
textByHash.554ec8c48e0c8ef1b1db08880a5690ed8c4900fb: I've upgraded your Fremennik sea boots for you. They can now teleport you here five times per day, you can now change your lyre teleport location to Waterbirth Island, access two new Lunar spells and you'll receive
textByHash.00edbd80a8e0b40affdcacd97013332afe1ae453: extra Agility experience from the Rellekka rooftop course.
textByHash.1899aa8cfe180fdd86fa73ff1f5ec1ed49e5d1b3: I can see that, well done! You've completed all of the tasks in the Fremennik Province! Here's your reward!
textByHash.ccb793092f030db1045f1a8a812e4ea4fc3878b1: I've upgraded your Fremennik sea boots for you. In addition to all of the previous benefits, your boots now have unlimited teleports to Rellekka, your lyre can now teleport you to Jatiszo or Neitiznot, you'll no longer
textByHash.6abf6744a0e7416ce5cc415be18d3480e90be8de: need a seal of passage on Lunar Isle, Dagannoth bones will be dropped as notes and your subjects will approve of your kingdom management even faster than before.
